title: Hello, World!
content:
Welcome to my blog! This is a sample first post — feel free to replace this with your own writing.

This site is built with plain HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript, and served via GitHub Pages. No build step, no frameworks — just fast, simple, and easy to maintain.

How the blog works

Each post lives in a posts/ directory as a JSON file. The file contains the post title, date, tags, and HTML content. To add a new post:

  1. Create a new file at posts/my-post-slug.json with your content.
  2. Add an entry for it in posts/index.json.
  3. Commit and push — GitHub Pages deploys automatically.

That's it. No CMS, no database, no server.

What's next

Replace this placeholder with your own writing. Talk about something you built, a problem you solved, a book you read — whatever you find interesting.

Thanks for reading!
